OPERATIONAL_FLOWS_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Configure the closing flows: the resolution buttons (e.g. Won/Lost), the attributes required at closing time and the events sent to Meta. Assignment rules decide which flow each conversation uses.

API.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not delete the closing flow

CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete {flowName}?
CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Tem certeza de que deseja excluir este fluxo de fechamento? Os times e caixas que o utilizam ficarão sem fluxo.

FORM.SUBTITLE: Define the closing buttons and what is required when resolving a conversation.

META.LABEL: Send conversions to Meta
META.HELP: Master switch for this flow. When on, each state below can fire a Meta event.

CATEGORY.LABEL: Category
CATEGORY.HELP: Reporting dimension. Sales closings feed the sales funnel; support closings are kept separate and never count as conversions.

STATES.LABEL: Estados do fluxo
STATES.META_NEED_VALUE_ATTR: The Purchase event requires a value. Create a conversation custom attribute of type Number (e.g. "Sale value") under Settings → Custom attributes and select it here.
STATES.META_VALUE_HELP: On save, this attribute becomes required for this state: the agent will be asked to fill it when closing the conversation.

USED_BY.TITLE: This flow is used by:
USED_BY.EMPTY: Nenhum time usa este fluxo ainda.

FORM.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not save the closing flow

REQUIREMENTS.LABEL: Atributos obrigatórios do fluxo
REQUIREMENTS.HELP: Attributes the agent must fill before resolving as one of these states.
REQUIREMENTS.IF_NO_LIST_ATTRS: No multiple-choice (list) attribute available. Create one under Custom attributes.

CAIXA_FLOWS.DESCRIPTION: Usado apenas quando a conversa não tem time nem agente de um time: vale o fluxo da caixa. Útil pra números dedicados a uma única função.
CAIXA_FLOWS.SAVE_ERROR: Não foi possível atualizar o fluxo da caixa

TIME_FLOWS.DESCRIPTION: O fluxo segue o time da conversa: time atribuído à conversa ou, sem ele, o time do agente que atendeu. Configure aqui qual fluxo cada time usa.
TIME_FLOWS.SAVE_ERROR: Não foi possível atualizar o fluxo do time
